product_overview: A full-stack grocery e-commerce platform that supports guest and authenticated shopping, server-verified checkout, order tracking, and post-delivery reviews. Administrators can manage products, inspect analytics, and update order statuses through protected endpoints.
core_goals: Allow guests to shop without forcing signup, with cart persistence through login
Provide a fast, reliable checkout flow with verified server-side pricing
Support both online payment and cash on delivery
Let customers review only items they've actually purchased and received
Give admins visibility and control over orders and product catalog

features.name: Authentication and session management
features.description: Users can sign in using JWT cookie-based authentication, enabling secure access to account and admin operations.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with message and user profile -> Authenticated session is established via httpOnly cookie instant_access_token -> User can access protected routes
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 or validation error -> No auth cookie is set -> User remains unauthenticated

features.name: Product catalog browsing
features.description: Users can browse products by category with search, sorting, and pagination, supporting guest shopping before login.
user_flows: GET /api/products with category, search, sort, and pagination query parameters -> Receive 200 with matching product list and pagination metadata -> User views catalog and selects products to inspect
GET /api/products with an invalid page or unsupported query values -> Receive 400 validation error -> No products are returned for the invalid request

features.name: Guest and authenticated cart management
features.description: Shoppers can add items to a guest cart or user cart, and the cart merges automatically after login so shopping is not interrupted.
user_flows: GET /api/cart as a guest -> Receive 200 with existing guest cart or empty cart -> POST /api/cart/items with productId and quantity -> Receive 200 with updated cart totals -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 and guest cart is merged into user cart
POST /api/cart/items with quantity exceeding available stock -> Receive 400 or stock error -> Cart is not updated -> User can retry with a valid quantity

features.name: Address book and delivery preparation
features.description: Authenticated users can manage delivery addresses and select a shipping destination during checkout.
user_flows: GET /api/addresses with authenticated cookie -> Receive 200 with saved addresses -> POST /api/addresses with recipient and location details -> Receive 201 with newly saved address -> User can choose that address for checkout
POST /api/addresses without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Address is not saved -> User must log in first

features.name: Checkout and order placement
features.description: Users can place orders with server-calculated totals using either Stripe card payment or cash on delivery, with pricing never trusted from the client.
user_flows: POST /api/orders/checkout with valid cart, address, and payment method -> Receive 200 or 201 with order summary and payment instructions -> Server calculates subtotal, tax, delivery fee, and total -> Order is created successfully
POST /api/orders/checkout with an empty cart or missing address -> Receive 400 validation error -> No order is created -> User must fix checkout prerequisites

features.name: Stripe payment confirmation
features.description: Card payments are confirmed reliably through Stripe webhook processing so paid orders reflect the final payment status.
user_flows: POST /api/payments/stripe/create-session with a valid order -> Receive 200 with Stripe checkout session details -> User completes payment on Stripe -> POST /api/payments/stripe/webhook receives payment event -> Order payment status is updated to paid
POST /api/payments/stripe/webhook with an invalid signature -> Receive 400 webhook verification error -> Payment status is not updated -> Order remains unchanged

features.name: Order history and order tracking
features.description: Customers can view their past orders and monitor order state as it moves from placed to delivered or cancelled.
user_flows: GET /api/orders with authenticated cookie -> Receive 200 with the user's order list -> GET /api/orders/:id with a selected order id -> Receive 200 with order details and status history -> User tracks fulfillment progress
GET /api/orders/:id for an order that does not belong to the authenticated user -> Receive 403 forbidden or 404 not found -> No order details are returned

features.name: Review submission for delivered items
features.description: Users can submit reviews only for items they purchased and received, and each order item can be reviewed once.
user_flows: POST /api/reviews with delivered order item details and rating/comment -> Receive 201 with created review -> Product review is saved and item is marked reviewed
POST /api/reviews for an item that is not delivered, not purchased by the user, or already reviewed -> Receive 400/403 validation error -> Review is rejected

features.name: Admin analytics and dashboard insights
features.description: Admins can view sales and inventory summary metrics to monitor platform performance.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/analytics with admin cookie -> Receive 200 with totalSales, totalOrders, totalUsers, totalProducts, and totalOutOfStock -> Admin reviews platform health
GET /api/admin/analytics without admin authorization -> Receive 401 or 403 unauthorized -> Analytics data is not returned

features.name: Admin product management
features.description: Admins can list products and create new catalog entries with pricing, stock, and activation controls.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/products?page=1&limit=20 with admin cookie -> Receive 200 with product list and pagination -> POST /api/admin/products with categoryId, pricing, images, and stockCount -> Receive 201 with created product summary
POST /api/admin/products with missing required fields or invalid prices -> Receive 400 validation error -> Product is not created

features.name: Admin order management
features.description: Admins can list all orders and update fulfillment status as an order progresses through the delivery lifecycle.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/orders?page=1&limit=20 with admin cookie -> Receive 200 with paginated order list -> PUT /api/admin/orders/:id/status with a valid next status and optional note -> Receive 200 with updated order and status history
PUT /api/admin/orders/:id/status with an invalid status transition or non-admin cookie -> Receive 400, 401, or 403 error -> Order status is not updated

features.name: AI content generation for products
features.description: Admins can use AI assistance to generate or rephrase product titles and descriptions for catalog management.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/ai/generate with action=rephrase-title or generate-desc, title, unit, and optional description -> Receive 200 with generated result text -> Admin uses the generated content in product setup
POST /api/admin/ai/generate with missing action or title -> Receive 400 validation error -> No generated content is returned

orders.paymentStatus: pending or paid or failed or refunded
orders.status: placed or confirmed or assigned or packed or out_for_delivery or delivered or cancelled

request.status: confirmed or assigned or packed or out_for_delivery or delivered or cancelled
